message:
test(proptest): add 7 serde roundtrip tests for tx_observability uncovered types

Covers TxObservabilityEvent, TxTimelineEntry, BundleMetadata,
LedgerRecordSummary, ResumeSummary, ChainVerificationSummary,
RedactionMetadata. All 27 tests pass (20 existing + 7 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
